project.description: Configure the PIC-SURE Logging Service API key in wildfly standalone.xml. Reads the key from logging.env and replaces the current value in standalone.xml.

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
LOGGING_ENV="/usr/local/docker-config/logging/logging.env" STANDALONE="/usr/local/docker-config/wildfly/standalone.xml"
if [ ! -f "$LOGGING_ENV" ]; then echo "No logging.env found at $LOGGING_ENV - skipping." exit 0 fi
NEW_API_KEY=$(grep '^LOGGING_API_KEY=' "$LOGGING_ENV" | cut -d= -f2-) if [ -z "$NEW_API_KEY" ]; then echo "LOGGING_API_KEY not set in $LOGGING_ENV - skipping." exit 0 fi
# Read current value from standalone.xml OLD_API_KEY=$(grep 'logging_api_key' "$STANDALONE" | sed 's/.*value="\([^"]*\)".*/\1/')
if [ "$OLD_API_KEY" = "$NEW_API_KEY" ]; then echo "Logging API key already up to date." exit 0 fi
echo "Updating logging_api_key in standalone.xml" sed -i "s|$OLD_API_KEY|$NEW_API_KEY|g" "$STANDALONE"
